description: CompositionSolid pink sweater made of blended cotton fabric, has an exaggerated mock collar, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two front pockets ruched on the outside, and a ribbed hem made of cotton-elastane fabricFittingRegularWash careWarm machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wring dryDry in shadeMedium iron, but do not iron on printThis easy-to-wear sweater from jealous 21 adds a bold brassy look to your winter wardrobe. Show off your urban style in this fashionably tailored fuschia piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this versatile knitwear with a tonal top and richly hued denims.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
